explainTopic.line3: Start with a simple analogy or metaphor
explainTopic.line4: Break it down step by step
explainTopic.line5: Use real-world examples to illustrate key points
explainTopic.line6: Include diagrams or visual descriptions where helpful
explainTopic.line9: Compare with related concepts to show differences
explainTopic.line10: Provide a summary checklist of key points

explainCode.line2: Start with a {{depth}} overview of what the code does and why
explainCode.line3: Walk through the code line by line or block by block
explainCode.line4: Explain the purpose of each function, class, or module
explainCode.line5: Highlight any design patterns used (observer, factory, singleton, etc.)
explainCode.line6: Explain any complex algorithms and their time/space complexity
explainCode.line7: Point out edge cases the code handles (or should handle)
explainCode.line8: Explain dependencies and how this code connects to the larger system
explainCode.line9: Note any non-obvious tricks, workarounds, or magic numbers
explainCode.line10: Summarize with a mental model: how should someone think about this code?

explainConcept.line3: Start with a simple analogy or metaphor from everyday life
explainConcept.line4: Give a clear, concise definition in one sentence
explainConcept.line5: Explain why this concept matters — what problem does it solve?
explainConcept.line7: Compare it with related or often-confused concepts — what's the difference?
explainConcept.line8: Address the top 3 common misconceptions about this concept
explainConcept.line9: Explain when and where to apply it (and when not to)
explainConcept.line10: Provide a summary checklist of the key points to remember

explainProcess.line3: List the prerequisites: what needs to be in place before starting?
explainProcess.line4: Break it down into numbered steps — each step should be a clear, actionable instruction
explainProcess.line5: For each step, note the expected input and output
explainProcess.line6: Highlight decision points: where does the process branch? What determines which path?
explainProcess.line7: Call out common failure points and how to handle them
explainProcess.line8: Describe how to verify each step was completed successfully
explainProcess.line9: Include a text-based flowchart or diagram if it helps clarify the flow
explainProcess.line10: End with what happens after the process completes — what's the next step?

explainError.line3: Translate the error message into plain language — what is it actually saying?
explainError.line4: Explain the root cause: what condition or code triggers this error?
explainError.line5: List the most common scenarios that produce this error (ranked by likelihood)
explainError.line6: Provide step-by-step fix for each scenario with code examples
explainError.line7: Explain why each fix works — what was wrong and how the fix addresses it
explainError.line8: Check for side effects: could the fix break anything else?
explainError.line9: Show how to prevent this error from occurring again
explainError.line10: List related errors that often appear alongside this one

explainArchitecture.line3: Start with a bird's-eye view: what are the main components and how do they connect?
explainArchitecture.line4: Describe the data flow: how does a request travel through the system from start to finish?
explainArchitecture.line5: Explain each major component's responsibility and technology choice
explainArchitecture.line6: Identify the communication patterns: sync vs async, REST vs events, etc.
explainArchitecture.line7: Discuss trade-offs: why was this architecture chosen? What were the alternatives?
explainArchitecture.line8: Identify potential bottlenecks and single points of failure
explainArchitecture.line9: Describe how the system scales: horizontally, vertically, or both?
explainArchitecture.line10: Provide a text-based architecture diagram showing component relationships

explainData.line3: Start with the big picture — what story is the data telling?
explainData.line4: Identify the key trends, patterns, and outliers
explainData.line5: Explain what each metric means in plain language
explainData.line6: Highlight correlations and what's driving the changes
explainData.line7: Point out what's missing or what the data doesn't tell us
explainData.line8: Suggest the best chart types to visualize each insight
explainData.line9: Provide actionable takeaways — what should we do based on this data?
explainData.line10: Flag any data quality issues or caveats to be aware of

explainMath.line3: Start with the intuition — what is this really doing, in plain English?
explainMath.line4: Use a concrete, real-world analogy to build understanding
explainMath.line5: Walk through the formula step by step, explaining each symbol and operation
explainMath.line6: Show a worked example with actual numbers
explainMath.line7: Explain when and why you'd use this in practice
explainMath.line8: Visualize it — describe or suggest a graph/diagram that makes it click
explainMath.line9: Point out common mistakes and edge cases to watch for
explainMath.line10: Connect it to related concepts — what should I learn next?

explainLegal.line3: Translate the legal jargon into plain, everyday language
explainLegal.line4: Summarize the key rights, obligations, and restrictions
explainLegal.line5: Highlight clauses I should pay special attention to and why
explainLegal.line6: Explain what happens if I violate the terms or the other party does
explainLegal.line7: Flag any unusual, aggressive, or one-sided terms
explainLegal.line8: Compare to standard/typical terms — is this normal or unusual?
explainLegal.line9: List specific questions I should ask a lawyer before signing
explainLegal.line10: Provide a plain-language summary I could share with a colleague

explainDifference.line3: Start with a one-sentence summary of the key difference
explainDifference.line4: Compare them side by side on 5-7 important dimensions
explainDifference.line5: For each dimension, explain which one is stronger and why
explainDifference.line6: Give a concrete scenario where you'd choose one over the other
explainDifference.line7: Address common misconceptions about their differences
explainDifference.line8: Explain when they can be used together or complement each other
explainDifference.line10: End with a clear recommendation: which to choose based on different needs

explainAnalogy.line3: Start with one powerful core analogy that captures the essence
explainAnalogy.line4: Extend the analogy step by step to cover the key components
explainAnalogy.line5: Show where the analogy holds perfectly and where it breaks down
explainAnalogy.line6: Add 2-3 alternative analogies from different angles
explainAnalogy.line7: Use the analogy to explain the most confusing aspects
explainAnalogy.line8: Map each analogy element back to the real concept
explainAnalogy.line9: Include a memorable one-liner summary using the analogy
explainAnalogy.line10: End with what the analogy doesn't cover — what to learn next
